---
title: "Threading FFT In Rust vs. C Languages"
format: pdf
echo: false
---

``` {python}
def speedup(t_1: float, t_2: float) -> float:
    return t_1 / t_2

def parallel_fraction(SU: float, N: int) -> float:
    """Compute P% (percentage of the program that is parallelizable) from observed speedup and number of workers."""
    return (SU - 1) / (SU * (1 - 1/N))
```
